title: Vlada Bortnik endorses Incorruptible
summary: Marco Polo founder Vlada Bortnik says the book had her in tears — not from sadness but because it gave her hope and proof that building something wildly successful and deeply good is possible.
blockquote: I've read countless business books, but this is the first that had me in tears not out of sadness, but because it gave me hope. Incorruptible is not just a book. It's permission. It's a blueprint. And it's proof that you're not crazy for wanting to build something that's both wildly successful and deeply good, something that lasts. For any founder who truly wants to make a difference, this is a must read.
attribution_title: Founder and CEO of Marco Polo

type_metadata.highlight: 'The first business book that made me cry'
